# Freelance CMS — LLM / AI agent context
# https://bilohash.com/freelance/

> Freelance CMS is a PHP freelance marketplace and job board platform. The live demo shows project listings, proposal forms and admin management — customizable for Upwork/Fiverr-style talent networks across Norway and Europe.

## Product
- Name: Freelance CMS
- Type: PHP freelance marketplace / job board script (no framework)
- Languages: Norwegian (default), English, Ukrainian, Russian
- Contact: https://bilohash.com/freelance/contact.php
- Developer: https://bilohash.com/

## Core URLs
- Live demo: https://bilohash.com/freelance/
- Use cases hub: https://bilohash.com/freelance/solutions.php
- Become a freelancer: https://bilohash.com/freelance/become-freelancer.php
- SEO regions hub: https://bilohash.com/freelance/regions.php
- Product page: https://bilohash.com/freelance/site/
- Contact / order development: https://bilohash.com/freelance/contact.php
- Admin demo: https://bilohash.com/freelance/admin/ (demo / bilofreelance2026)
- Sitemap: https://bilohash.com/freelance/sitemap.php

## Industry solution pages (10 vertical SEO landings)
Each page has unique title, meta description, keywords, FAQPage + Service Schema.org JSON-LD, hreflang NO/EN/UK/RU.

1. Web agencies — https://bilohash.com/freelance/web-agencies/
   PHP/React talent marketplace for web agencies. White-label job board, proposals, admin.

2. Design studios — https://bilohash.com/freelance/design-studios/
   UI/UX, branding, product design freelancer board with portfolio profiles.

3. AI consultants — https://bilohash.com/freelance/ai-consultants/
   Grok, OpenAI, RAG chatbot and ML integration marketplace template.

4. WordPress shops — https://bilohash.com/freelance/wordpress-shops/
   Elementor, WooCommerce, plugin gigs. Clickable WordPress skill tags for internal SEO.

5. Mobile dev teams — https://bilohash.com/freelance/mobile-dev-teams/
   iOS, Android, React Native, Flutter freelance hiring board.

6. Marketing networks — https://bilohash.com/freelance/marketing-freelancers/
   SEO, content, PPC, copywriting talent marketplace for marketing networks.

7. Startup hiring — https://bilohash.com/freelance/startup-hiring/
   Lean MVP/design/growth hiring without enterprise overhead.

8. NGO talent pools — https://bilohash.com/freelance/ngo-talent-pools/
   Volunteer and pro-bono talent networks for nonprofits. GDPR contact forms.

9. Remote EU teams — https://bilohash.com/freelance/remote-eu-teams/
   Distributed hiring across Norway, Ukraine, Lithuania and Europe. NOK budgets, multilingual briefs, hreflang.

10. Norwegian SMBs — https://bilohash.com/freelance/norwegian-smb/
    Affordable freelance board for Norwegian small businesses. NOK gigs, Oslo/Bergen regions, 4 languages.

## Region SEO pages
- Oslo: https://bilohash.com/freelance/oslo/
- Bergen: https://bilohash.com/freelance/bergen/
- Stavanger, Trondheim, Drammen, Kristiansand, Tromsø
- Europe: https://bilohash.com/freelance/europe/
- Ukraine: https://bilohash.com/freelance/ukraine/

## SEO & structured data
- Schema.org: SoftwareApplication, WebPage, Organization, ProfessionalService, Service, JobPosting, FAQPage, BreadcrumbList, ItemList
- Microdata on solution pages: WebPage, FAQPage, Question/Answer
- Open Graph and Twitter Cards on all public pages
- hreflang: no (default), en, uk, ru
- Canonical URLs, geo tags (Norway, Europe), llms.txt for AI crawlers
- Clickable skill tags → internal search (Elementor, WordPress, PHP, etc.)
- Per-vertical custom meta keywords and 5 FAQ items per page (3 niche + 2 base)

## Commercial intent (keywords)
- Order freelance marketplace development Norway
- PHP job board Europe / Upwork Fiverr clone CMS
- Web agency talent platform / design studio freelance board
- AI consultant marketplace / WordPress freelance script
- Startup hiring board / NGO volunteer talent pool
- Remote EU team hiring / Norwegian SMB freelance board
- Multilingual freelance site with admin panel

## Tech
- PHP 8+, JSON storage, modular i18n (no/en/uk/ru)
- Emerald responsive UI; admin: colours, reCAPTCHA, Grok/GPT chat widget
- 12 demo projects, 6+ freelancers, Simple/Pro tiers, categories + More nav
- Extensible: escrow, milestones, KYC, MySQL, white-label

- Auction CMS: https://bilohash.com/auction/site/

- WordPress AI Plugin: https://wordpress.org/plugins/bilohash-ai-chat-consultant/

- Root llms.txt: https://bilohash.com/llms.txt
